name: spelling-practice-app
description: A comprehensive educational application for spelling practice with Truth & Training Bible verses and enhanced features
releaseNotes: Added Truth & Training Agents of Grace Bible verses organized by sections
Enhanced Bible typing with section-based navigation and quick access buttons
Implemented SQLite database with comprehensive user and session management
Added user deletion functionality for admin interface
Fixed Bible typing visibility issues when returning to dashboard
Enhanced gamification system with proper challenge tracking
Implemented Progressive Web App (PWA) features for offline support
Added comprehensive logging and security middleware
Enhanced weeks-based wordlist functionality with proper server endpoints
Added touch events optimization for tablets
Added handwriting canvas with enhanced recognition
Created comprehensive pattern matching for spelling words
Added tablet detection and feature optimization
Enhanced recognition accuracy for educational content
